headlines.headline: Crevex Labs secures $120M contract with an international consortium

headlines.headline: Ulvyn Microchips launches next-generation process automation platform

sentiment.reasoning: Launching a next-generation platform indicates innovation and potential for new revenue streams, but market adoption and financial success are not guaranteed.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
